name: Tianming Novel System
description_en: A co-writing system for multi-volume long-form novels that keeps world-building, foreshadowing, pacing, and voice consistent across chapters.
description_zh: 面向多卷长篇小说的协同创作系统,在章节间保持世界观、伏笔、节奏与文风的一致性。
long_en: Command-driven (outline, plan, draft, manuscript, checkup, archive) and backed by external knowledge-base files for world rules, character profiles, events, and style samples.
long_zh: 以指令驱动(大纲/规划/草案/正文/体检/存档),并依赖外部知识库文件管理世界观规则、角色档案、事件与文风样本。
sec_note_en: Reads and writes local manuscript and knowledge-base files; keep backups of your work.
sec_note_zh: 读写本地稿件与知识库文件;请为作品保留备份。
